title: Sweet Pilaf
description: A simple and sweet pilaf dish made with rice and a hint of American flavors. Perfect as a side dish for any meal.
instructions: Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add onion and sauté until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add rice, sweet rice seasoning, and water to the skillet.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cover.
Simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the water is absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
